arabic: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
text: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will be rewarded according to their intention.

arabic: الدِّيْنُ النَّصِيْحَةُ
text: Religion is sincere advice.

arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
text: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.

arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
text: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.

arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
text: A Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hand other Muslims are safe.

arabic: أَحَبُّ الأَعْمَالِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَدْوَمُهَا وَإِنْ قَلَّ
text: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done consistently, even if they are few.

arabic: كُلُّ بَنِي آدَمَ خَطَّاءٌ وَخَيْرُ الْخَطَّائِينَ التَّوَّابُونَ
text: Every son of Adam commits sins, and the best of those who commit sins are those who repent.

arabic: اتَّقِ اللَّهَ حَيْثُمَا كُنْتَ وَأَتْبِعِ السَّيِّئَةَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَمْحُهَا
text: Fear Allah wherever you are, and follow a bad deed with a good one and it will erase it.

arabic: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
text: Whoever travels a path in search of knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise.

arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَنْظُرُ إِلَى صُوَرِكُمْ وَأَمْوَالِكُمْ وَلَكِنْ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَأَعْمَالِكُمْ
text: Verily, Allah does not look at your appearance or wealth, but He looks at your hearts and deeds.

arabic: خَيْرُكُمْ مَنْ تَعَلَّمَ الْقُرْآنَ وَعَلَّمَهُ
text: The best among you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.

arabic: بُنِيَ الإِسْلامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ
text: Islam is built upon five pillars: the testimony of faith, prayer, zakat, fasting, and Hajj.

arabic: يَسِّرُوا وَلَا تُعَسِّرُوا وَبَشِّرُوا وَلَا تُنَفِّرُوا
text: Make things easy and do not make them difficult; give glad tidings and do not drive people away.

arabic: الطُّهُورُ شَطْرُ الإِيمَانِ
text: Purity is half of faith.

arabic: مَا مَلَأَ آدَمِيٌّ وِعَاءً شَرًّا مِنْ بَطْنٍ
text: No human ever filled a vessel worse than the stomach. Sufficient for the son of Adam are a few morsels to keep his back straight.

arabic: أَكْمَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِيمَانًا أَحْسَنُهُمْ خُلُقًا
text: The most complete of believers in faith are those who are best in character.

arabic: إِنَّ مِنْ أَخَفِّ النَّاسِ عَذَابًا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ لَرَجُلٌ تُوضَعُ فِي أَخْمَصَيْ قَدَمَيْهِ جَمْرَتَانِ
text: Smile in your brother's face is a charity; enjoining good and forbidding evil is a charity.

arabic: لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
text: The strong person is not the one who overcomes people by force, but the one who controls himself when angry.

arabic: الدُّعَاءُ هُوَ الْعِبَادَةُ
text: Supplication is worship.

arabic: خَيْرُ الصَّدَقَةِ مَا كَانَ عَنْ ظَهْرِ غِنًى
text: The best charity is that which is given out of abundance.
